title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.440 - Emergency powers may be authorized
text:
67.440.  Emergency powers may be authorized. — The ordinances may provide that in cases where it reasonably appears there is an immediate danger to the health, safety, or welfare of any person, the building commissioner or designated officer or officers may take emergency measures to vacate and repair or demolish a dangerous building or structure.
(L. 1969 H.B. 60 § 5)
